name: Pipeline Tracker
description: Stage-based progression visualization with summary metrics per stage, funnel or horizontal bar visualization, and drill-down data table for items in each stage.

slots.header: Section title with _heading4, stage filter Select, period selector
slots.summary: Horizontal row of stage cards (_flex _gap3): stage name, item count (Badge), total value (Statistic)
slots.visualization: Chart({ type: 'funnel' }) or Chart({ type: 'bar' }) showing stage volumes with conversion rate annotations between stages
slots.detail: Tabbed DataTable showing items in selected stage with drill-down

command-center.notes: Stage cards use cc-bar. Chart segments get cc-glow on hover. DataTable gets cc-scanline. Stage counts use cc-data.
